name: Spending & Anomaly Tracker
description: Single-user spending tracker; transactions above a threshold are flagged as anomalies. Synthetic data only.
synthetic_data: SQLite user and transactions; demo-only, no real financial data.

endpoints.description: Dashboard: user name, balance, transaction list with anomaly highlighting.
Add a spending transaction; decrements user balance.
Seed random demo transactions (some may be above threshold).

default_goal: Add a few transactions; include some above the anomaly threshold so they appear flagged.

APP_TITLE.label: App title
APP_TITLE.help: Shown in the page title and header.

STARTING_BALANCE.label: Starting balance
STARTING_BALANCE.help: Initial balance when the user is created.

ANOMALY_THRESHOLD.label: Anomaly threshold
ANOMALY_THRESHOLD.help: Transactions with amount above this are flagged as anomalies.
